ipteunyeong.title: The Joy of Robot Vacuums
ipteunyeong.text: It's been a few months since I got a robot vacuum, and it has completely transformed my daily routine. At first, I thought of it as just another appliance, but now it feels like a beloved companion that has improved my quality of life significantly. Every morning while I'm getting ready for work, it quietly cleans every corner of the house all on its own. When I come home from work and see the spotless floors without a speck of dust, it melts away my daily fatigue. It's especially helpful on weekends when I have guests over, as having the place cleaned in advance makes hosting so much easier. I find it endearing to watch it work hard while dodging obstacles around the furniture. The robot vacuum has freed me from the stress of cleaning, allowing me to use that time to focus on other important things or simply relax. It has truly given me the gift of time and breathing room in my busy life.
ipteunyeong.korean_summary: 로봇 청소기를 구입한 지 몇 달이 되었는데, 일상을 완전히 바꿔놓았습니다. 처음엔 단순한 가전제품으로 생각했지만, 이제는 삶의 질을 높여주는 소중한 동반자가 되었습니다. 출근 준비를 하는 동안 혼자서 집안 구석구석을 청소해주고, 퇴근 후 깨끗한 바닥을 보면 하루의 피로가 풀립니다. 청소 스트레스에서 해방되어 다른 일에 집중하거나 휴식할 수 있는 시간과 여유를 선물받았습니다.

gwitunyeong.title: Global Stock Rally Faces Growing Market Correction Risks
gwitunyeong.text: Global equities entered 2026 after a powerful rally, but veteran investors warn the advance may be fragile. Strong gains in 2025 and early 2026 have pushed valuations higher, while months without meaningful pullbacks have reduced buffers against market shocks. Goldman Sachs strategists argue markets are historically overdue for correction, suggesting that geopolitical tensions, policy shifts, or earnings disappointments could abruptly change sentiment. High-profile analysts warn that frothy valuations and excessive optimism magnify downside risks when a catalyst appears. Some experts caution against focusing solely on timing, noting concerns about market complacency, narrowing leadership, and heavy reliance on megacap technology shares. Particular attention is being paid to AI spending durability and potential stumbles among market leaders that could amplify volatility during the next adjustment period.
gwitunyeong.korean_summary: 2026년 글로벌 주식시장이 강력한 상승세 이후 조정 위험에 직면하고 있습니다. 골드만삭스를 비롯한 전문가들은 높아진 밸류에이션과 과도한 낙관론이 하락 리스크를 증폭시킬 수 있다고 경고했습니다. 특히 AI 투자의 지속성과 거대 기술주 의존도가 주요 우려 요인으로 지적되고 있습니다.

key_expressions.example: I used to think of it as just a hobby, but now it's my full-time career.
My dog has been my beloved companion for over ten years.
A warm cup of tea can melt away the stress of a long day.
The new deadline gives us some breathing room to perfect our proposal.
Many analysts believe the housing market is overdue for correction.
Market sentiment can abruptly change due to unexpected news.
Political uncertainty tends to amplify volatility in emerging markets.
Good leaders maintain composure even in challenging situations.

today_sentences.english: We need to schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss the project timeline in detail.
today_sentences.korean: 프로젝트 일정에 대해 자세히 논의하기 위한 후속 회의를 잡아야 합니다.

today_sentences.english: Could you please send me the quarterly report by the end of this week?
today_sentences.korean: 이번 주말까지 분기 보고서를 보내주실 수 있나요?

today_sentences.english: I'm planning to pick up a new hobby this weekend to help me relax.
today_sentences.korean: 긴장을 풀기 위해 이번 주말에 새로운 취미를 시작할 계획입니다.

quiz.korean: 로봇 청소기가 내 삶의 질을 크게 향상시켰다.
quiz.answer: The robot vacuum has greatly improved my quality of life.

quiz.korean: 주식 시장이 조정받을 때가 되었다고 전문가들이 경고하고 있다.
quiz.answer: Experts are warning that the stock market is overdue for correction.

quiz.korean: 어려운 상황에서도 침착함을 유지하는 것이 중요하다.
quiz.answer: It's important to maintain composure even in difficult situations.

quiz.sentence: When I come home from work and see the _____ floors, it melts away my fatigue.
quiz.korean: 퇴근 후 집에 와서 얼룩 하나 없이 깨끗한 바닥을 보면 피로가 풀린다.

quiz.sentence: Goldman Sachs strategists argue that markets are historically _____ for correction.
quiz.korean: 골드만삭스 전략가들은 시장이 역사적으로 조정받을 때가 되었다고 주장한다.

quiz.sentence: Political uncertainty tends to _____ volatility in the markets.
quiz.korean: 정치적 불확실성은 시장의 변동성을 증폭시키는 경향이 있다.
